description: Cost-optimization epic, candidate #5 (GitHub issue #38 item 1, owner-directed 2026-07-07; scope narrowed the same evening with the owner: the verifier corrects FACTUAL ACCURACY and DEDUP LABELLING only -- explicitly NOT content selection). The all-Haiku `haiku-swap` pipeline plus one Sonnet verification/correction pass after the brief is assembled. Structure: the HAIKU COORDINATOR runs the entire haiku-swap pipeline itself in its own thread (recent-priors read, skill research/write, candidates.json + source-usage.json) -- near-zero coordination overhead, unlike multiagent-aggressive-haiku's dedicated coordinator -- then delegates exactly one verification task to the SONNET verifier sub-agent, which (a) verifies the brief's headlines and factual claims (numbers, dates, dollar amounts, benchmark scores, direct quotes, named products/models) against each story's own cited sources via web search/fetch and corrects genuine inaccuracies IN PLACE, and (b) reads every dated prior brief and adds missing follow-up/repeat-coverage labels -- the exact weakness the 2026-07-07 investigation found (haiku-swap fetched and saved all 3 priors flawlessly but NEVER read them; Sonnet grepped them story-by-story, hence dedup 4 vs 2 -- a diligence gap, not an intelligence gap). The verifier NEVER changes which stories were selected (selection stays Haiku's call, keeping the selection lever attributable) and never touches candidates.json/source-usage.json. One deliberate ordering deviation from the haiku-swap base: the listening script is written AFTER verification, so it narrates the corrected brief. The verifier also writes /workspace/verification-report.json (claims checked, corrections, labels added) as an additional captured artifact. Mirrors the judge-methodology-v2 accuracy judge's method as an in-pipeline corrector; the corrected brief remains the run's final `AI Brief - YYYY-MM-DD.md` so the harness judges the corrected output. Content generation ONLY: holds no AWS/delivery role (FR-1), never fans out to subscribers, never synthesizes audio (no TTS in evals); its only delivery-side contact is the read-only GET /recent-briefs route. The coordinator and the verifier sub-agent are SEPARATE, newly-created agent resources (their own agent_ids, written once at first sync).
schedule_intent: none -- cost-optimization eval candidate only; never scheduled and never promoted to production without a separate, explicitly-approved cut-over decision
